description: A critical, long-lead-time spare part (e.g., a large motor) has been used from inventory. A planner must order a replacement to maintain readiness.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the system alert that the inventory for the critical spare has dropped to zero.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the specific part that needs to be reordered.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the approved vendor and pricing for this specific part.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the designated supplier and contract price.

nodes.task_description: Create and issue a purchase order to the vendor for one unit of the motor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates and sends the purchase order.
